name: Dill Pickles
recipeIngredient: dill -- on bottom and on top
recipeInstructions:
1. Pack cucumbers tightly into a jar.
2. Sprinkle the salt evenly over the cucumbers, then add the vinegar, pickling spice, jalapeno (remove seeds if you prefer less heat), and garlic cloves.
3. Scatter dill on top of everything in the jar.
4. Pour water over the ingredients to cover them completely.
5. Seal the jar with a lid.
6. Place the sealed jar upside down at room temperature for one day.
7. After one week, open the jar and check the pickles. If they are not fully preserved, store them upright in the refrigerator until ready to eat.
